Get in Touch

How our calculator works

Figures combine role-level eligibility, adoption level, and efficiency uplift assumptions drawn from research into AI in higher education. For the full methodology, assumptions, and limitations of this calculator:

Read more here →

Struggling to see ROI from AI? You're not alone.

Organisations are overwhelmed with AI hype, staff feel anxious, and leaders can't see ROI. WorkSmart-AI provides people-first training that turns AI adoption into measurable savings, confident staff, and more productive organisations. With over a decade of experience working with universities in edtech, digital skills and AI, we're confident in helping you achieve your outcomes.

...the full potential of AI can only be unlocked if the staff are well-trained and confident in using these new technologies responsibly.

- AI and Jisc's Leadership Survey 2025

Explore What We Offer

Discover our services to find the right mix of training and support for your institution's AI goals.

View Our Services

On average, people say AI has made them 33% more productive and saves them about 1.3 hours per day.

- AI Collaboration Index 2025, Atlassian

How we help you succeed

A structured, people-first approach to confident and measurable AI adoption.

Free Initial Consultation

A collaborative discussion to understand your institution's goals and challenges and see where you are on your AI journey.

AI Literacy & Needs Analysis

A collaborative discussion to understand your institution's goals and challenges and see where you are on your AI journey.

Personalised Workshops

Choose four of our workshops for us to personalise and deliver. Expert-led, hands-on training sessions (F2F or online) tailored to your institution.

On-Demand Online Courses

On-demand access to asynchronous courses that reinforce and extend the learning from our live workshops, for up to 100 staff per package.

Strategic Roadmap Session

A high-level session with your leadership to translate training insights into a clear action plan for sustaining momentum.

Ongoing Support

Continuous access to resources and our AI Cafe drop-in sessions to keep momentum strong as AI evolves. Follow up calls with SLT.

Book a Call
